metadata.description: Proof-it-runs terminal evidence for your repos — by aks-builds.

plugins.name: cliproof
plugins.description: Capture a real terminal command and its real output as a polished screenshot or GIF, then embed it into README.md as proof the software works. Static screenshots via Charm `freeze`; animated demos via `vhs`. Enforced secret redaction, command-safety guard, and idempotent README inserts.
